examples.name: allow code and reason (GET /api/v4/projects/alpha/issues)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - paths:
        - /api/v4/projects/{project}/**
      where: contains(user.traits["allowed_projects"], vars.project)
      allow_code: allowed_project
      allow_reason: User has access to project
      deny_hint:
        - deny_code: denied_project
          deny_reason: User has NO access to project
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /api/v4/projects/alpha/issues
identity:
    name: alice
    roles:
        - developer
    traits:
        allowed_projects:
            - alpha
            - beta

        - deny_code: denied_project

    path: /api/v4/projects/gamma/issues
identity:
    name: alice
    roles:
        - developer
    traits:
        allowed_projects:
            - alpha
            - beta

examples.name: deny hints across rules, only some fire (GET /api/v4/projects/gamma/issues)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - paths:
        - /api/v4/projects/{project}/**
      where: contains(user.traits["allowed_projects"], vars.project)
      deny_hint:
        - deny_code: denied_project
          deny_reason: Not allowed on this project
    - paths:
        - /api/v4/admin/**
      where: contains(user.roles, "admin")
      deny_hint:
        - deny_code: denied_admin
          deny_reason: Admin role required
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /api/v4/projects/gamma/issues
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer
    traits:
        allowed_projects:
            - alpha

examples.name: deny hints across rules, only some fire (GET /api/v4/admin/settings)

      where: contains(user.traits["allowed_projects"], vars.project)

          deny_reason: Not allowed on this project
    - paths:

          deny_reason: Admin role required

examples.name: checked against a set (GET /data/x/b/info)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - paths:
        - /data/*/{letter}/**
      where: contains(set("a", "b", "c"), vars.letter)
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /data/x/b/info
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: equals identity (GET /api/v4/user/alice)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - paths:
        - /api/v4/user/{username}
      where: user.name == vars.username
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /api/v4/user/alice
identity:
    name: alice
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: equals identity (GET /api/v4/user/bob)

    path: /api/v4/user/bob

        - developer

examples.name: glob_without: exclude single segments (GET /files/report)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(literal("files",
            glob_without(set("private", "secret"))))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /files/report
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: greedy_except: a capture inside is a load error
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(literal("files",
            greedy_except(capture("name"))))

examples.name: greedy_except: add greedy() to exclude the whole subtree (GET /files/secret/key)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(literal("files",
            greedy_except(literal("secret", greedy()))))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /files/secret/key
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

role_name: developer

    - where: |-
        path.match(
          literal(
            "api",
            literal(
              "v4",
              literal(
                "buildinfo"))))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /api/v4/buildinfo
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: nested literal chain (GET /api/v4)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(
          literal(
            "api",
            literal(
              "v4",
              literal(
                "buildinfo"))))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /api/v4
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: nested literal chain (GET /api/v4/buildinfo/extra)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(
          literal(
            "api",
            literal(
              "v4",
              literal(
                "buildinfo"))))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /api/v4/buildinfo/extra
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: trailing slash (GET /api/v4/health/)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - paths:
        - /api/v4/health/
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /api/v4/health/
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: trailing slash (GET /api/v4/health)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - paths:
        - /api/v4/health/
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /api/v4/health
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: root: a path under no root is denied (GET /public/x)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(root(
            literal("api", greedy()),
            literal("admin", greedy())))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /public/x
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: root: a path under no root is denied (GET /api/x)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(root(
            literal("api", greedy()),
            literal("admin", greedy())))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /api/x
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: root: a path under no root is denied (GET /admin/y)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(root(
            literal("api", greedy()),
            literal("admin", greedy())))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /admin/y
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: root: nested anywhere but the top is a load error
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(literal("files",
            root(literal("a"), literal("b"))))

examples.name: root: several first segments in one tree (GET /admin/settings)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(root(
            literal("api", greedy()),
            literal("admin", greedy())))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /admin/settings
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

    - where: |-

examples.name: root: several first segments in one tree (GET /other)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(root(
            literal("api", greedy()),
            literal("admin", greedy())))
examples.input:

    path: /other

examples.name: optional_slash: match with or without a trailing slash (GET /files/)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(literal("files",
            optional_slash()))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /files/
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: optional_slash: match with or without a trailing slash (GET /files)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(literal("files",
            optional_slash()))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /files
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: optional_slash: match with or without a trailing slash (GET /files/x)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: |-
        path.match(literal("files",
            optional_slash()))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /files/x
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: slash: a trailing slash is required (GET /files)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: path.match(literal("files", slash()))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /files
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: slash: a trailing slash is required (GET /files/)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: path.match(literal("files", slash()))
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /files/
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: slash: the bare root path / (GET /)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: path.match(slash())
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /
identity:
    name: bob
    roles:
        - developer

examples.name: slash: the bare root path / (GET /x)
examples.rule:
role_name: developer
app_resources:
    - where: path.match(slash())
examples.input:
request:
    method: GET
    path: /x
identity:
